metadata.title: Grok Imagine - AI Video Generator | Marble AI
metadata.description: Grok Imagine by xAI. Multimodal image and video generation model that converts text or images into short visual outputs with coherent motion and synchronized audio.

hero.title: Grok Imagine
hero.description: xAI's multimodal video generation model. Convert text or images into short visual outputs with coherent motion and synchronized audio.

introduce.title: About Grok Imagine
introduce.label: Model Overview
introduce.description: Grok Imagine is xAI's multimodal image and video generation model that converts text or images into short visual outputs with coherent motion and synchronized audio capabilities.

items.title: Multimodal Input
items.description: Supports both text and image inputs for versatile generation.

items.title: Coherent Motion
items.description: Generate videos with smooth and coherent motion dynamics.

items.title: Synchronized Audio
items.description: Native audio output synchronized with video content.

items.title: Fast Generation
items.description: Quick video generation for rapid content creation.

features.title: Key Features
features.description: Discover what makes Grok Imagine a leading AI video generation model.

items.title: Text To Video
items.description: Generate stunning videos from text descriptions with coherent motion.

items.title: Image To Video
items.description: Transform static images into dynamic video content with natural motion.

items.title: Video To Video
items.description: Edit and transform existing videos with AI-powered enhancement.

items.title: Audio Generation
items.description: Generate synchronized audio including speech and ambient sounds.

items.title: HD Output
items.description: High-resolution video output with exceptional detail.

items.title: Commercial License
items.description: Full commercial rights for all generated videos.

use-cases.description: Explore the diverse applications of Grok Imagine.

items.description: Generate viral-ready content for TikTok, Instagram, and YouTube.

items.title: What is Grok Imagine?
items.description: Grok Imagine is xAI's multimodal image and video generation model with coherent motion and synchronized audio.

items.title: What generation modes does it support?
items.description: Grok Imagine supports Text To Video (T2V), Image To Video (I2V), and Video To Video (V2V) generation modes.

items.title: Who created Grok Imagine?
items.description: Grok Imagine is created by xAI, Elon Musk's artificial intelligence company.

items.title: What makes it unique?
items.description: Grok Imagine excels at multimodal input, coherent motion generation, and synchronized audio output.

items.title: Can I use it commercially?
items.description: Yes! All videos generated with Grok Imagine through Marble AI come with full commercial rights.

items.title: How fast is it?
items.description: Grok Imagine offers quick video generation for rapid content creation workflows.

cta.title: Ready to Try Grok Imagine?
cta.description: Experience xAI's multimodal video generation. Create videos with coherent motion and audio.
